zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais於1125年之前出生在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾米波瓦時，他的父親Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais41歲，母親Aveline d'Étampes12歲。他於1144年與Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz在比利時利包格辛特-特盧易登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌阿斯-蒙斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: “le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Spanish (Andalusia; Alé): unexplained.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

variants.name: Aleo
meanings: From Latin. See Alexis .

variants.name: Al
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

nameMeanings.name: riche”
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name (see   Reich  ).

variants.name: Rickel
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in Haspengau (near Lüttich) named Rickel.
German: from a female ancient Germanic personal name, Riclind.
German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + walt- ‘rule’.

variants.name: Reich
meanings: Nordic. See Eric .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais was born before 1125, in Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, his father, Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais, was 41 and his mother, Aveline d'Étampes, was 12. He married Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz in 1144, in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1170, in Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais est né avant 1125, à Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, son père, Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Aveline d'Étampes, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz en 1144, à Sint-Truiden, Limbourg, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1170, à Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais vor 1125 in Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais 41 und seine Mutter Aveline d'Étampes 12. Er hat 1144 in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgien Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1170 in Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais è nato il prima del 1125 nel Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Aveline d'Étampes, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz nel 1144, nel Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1170, nel Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvaisが1125年以前にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジミレプオイックスで生まれた時，父Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvaisは41歳，母Aveline d'Étampesは12歳であった。1144年にベルギーリンブルグシント-トルイデンでJeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Loozと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンアスイス-モンスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais(이)가 1125년 이전 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 미어프이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline d'Étampes(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1144년 벨기에 림버그 신트-트루이든에서 Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 앳히스-몬스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais nasceu antes 1125, em Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Aveline d'Étampes, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz em 1144, em Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1170, em Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais родился перед 1125 г. в местности мирепоикс, ариeдж, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Aveline d'Étampes, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz в 1144 г. в местности синт-труиден, лимбург, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1170 г. в местности атис-монс, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean II “le riche” de Corbeil-Beauvais nació antes de 1125, en Mirepoix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Baudouin V de Corbeil-Beauvais, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Aveline d'Étampes, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Jeanne dite 'Carcassonne' de Duras-Looz en 1144, en Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1170, en Athis-Mons, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia.
